description: More cinematic sad variation for MV-first emotional songs.
vocal_feeling: smooth male vocal, cinematic heartfelt delivery
pacing: slow build, emotional bridge, big final chorus
instrumentation_style: piano, clean guitar, warm bass, soft drums, cinematic pad, melodic guitar solo
brand_style: cinematic sadness, reflective, dramatic, cinematic sad pop rock
vocal_style: smooth male vocal, cinematic heartfelt delivery
atmosphere_elements: slow build, emotional bridge, big final chorus
default_music_style_prompt: cinematic sad Thai pop rock, piano, clean electric guitar, warm bass, soft drums, cinematic pad, melodic guitar solo, smooth emotional male vocal
lyric_style: natural conversational Thai lyrics, clear emotional story, not overly poetic

suno_advanced_settings.reason_th: Public beta preset values are controlled and safe for consistent creator output.

writing_rules: Thai lyrics must sound natural and conversational
Hook must be short, emotional, catchy, and caption-friendly
Do not reference real artists or copyrighted artist styles
Instrument and production tags inside parentheses must be English only
Final Chorus should feel stronger than previous chorus

section_instrument_tags.Intro: acoustic guitar strumming, soft rhodes piano, relaxed mid-tempo beat
section_instrument_tags.Verse 1: clean electric guitar picking, warm bass, smooth male vocal
section_instrument_tags.Pre-Chorus: drum pattern builds up slightly, light synth pad
section_instrument_tags.Chorus: full band drops in, catchy pop rock groove, tambourine added
section_instrument_tags.Post-Chorus: melodic electric guitar solo, easy listening vibe
section_instrument_tags.Verse 2: bass and drum focus, rhythmic acoustic strumming
section_instrument_tags.Bridge: music drops down, piano and cinematic pad, emotional tension
section_instrument_tags.Guitar Solo: melodic and expressive pop-rock guitar solo, driving rhythm
section_instrument_tags.Final Chorus: maximum energy, full band, brighter vocal delivery, expanded emotion
section_instrument_tags.Outro: fading out with acoustic guitar and soft piano, lingering clean guitar note

mv_identity.color_profile: cinematic sad, rain, reflective city lights
mv_identity.visual_mood: cinematic sad, rain, reflective city lights
